## 📋 Today's Overview
*April 23, 2026*

### Superconductivity (12 new today)

1. The study focuses on **Mo₂C nanoflakes**, employing **transport measurements** to address **the conditions for observing intrinsic superconducting diode effects without an applied magnetic field**.
2. The study focuses on **La₃Ni₂O₇ single crystals**, employing **high-pressure synthesis and electrical transport** to address **achieving higher and more reproducible superconducting transition temperatures in nickelates**.
3. The study focuses on **thick FeSe films**, employing **a high-throughput off-center sputtering technique** to address **identifying the competing constraints beyond strain that determine the superconducting transition temperature**.
4. The study focuses on **the three-dimensional Hofstadter-Hubbard model**, employing **numerical calculations** to address **determining the superconducting phase diagram as the magnetic flux is tuned across the critical value for Weyl point emergence**.
5. The study focuses on **the Heusler alloy Pd₂ZrIn**, employing **muon spin relaxation and rotation (μSR) measurements** to address **unveiling the nature of its superconducting ground state and the role of disorder**.
6. The study focuses on **the intrinsic superconducting diode effect**, employing **a universal symmetry criterion and graph-theoretic construction** to address **establishing the necessary and sufficient conditions for its occurrence beyond time-reversal and inversion symmetry breaking**.
7. The study focuses on **wave-particle duality**, employing **a Mach-Zehnder interferometer on a superconducting quantum processor** to address **demonstrating the quantum Zeno effect and continuous transition between wave and particle behavior in which-way experiments**.
8. The study focuses on **quantum critical systems**, employing **a theoretical analysis of memory-dominated infrared dynamics** to address **proposing a universal mechanism for high-temperature superconductivity arising from scale-free relaxation**.
9. The study focuses on **Ruddlesden-Popper nickelate superconductors**, employing **a review of recent literature** to address **summarizing the progress and current understanding of superconductivity in both bulk and thin-film forms**.
10. The study focuses on **Au₂Pb₀.₉₁₄P₂**, employing **electrochemical oxidation** to address **synthesizing a superconducting polar metal to explore emergent phenomena from broken inversion symmetry**.
11. The study focuses on **a two-dimensional electron gas**, employing **a mean-field theoretical model with quadrupolar interactions** to address **determining the phase diagram for the competition and coexistence of superconductivity and nematic order**.
12. The study focuses on **circuit quantum electrodynamics (cQED) architectures**, employing **theoretical proposals using asymmetric SQUIDs as superconducting diodes** to address **enabling nonreciprocal quantum information processing with a flux-tunable element**.

### spin glass (1 new today)

1. The study focuses on the disordered cubic lattice material γ-Ba₃CoNb₂O₉, employing specific-heat, susceptibility, and muon spin-rotation measurements to address the nature of its dynamical magnetism and short-range correlations near the site-percolation threshold.
2. The study focuses on the Sherrington-Kirkpatrick model with planted solutions, employing a statistical physics analysis of the Franz-Parisi potential to address the computational hardness and phase transitions in structured constraint satisfaction problems.
3. The study focuses on the quantum p-spin spherical model, employing path-integral and replica methods to address the characterization of its complex free-energy landscape and the nature of its quantum spin glass phase.
4. The study focuses on the classical Heisenberg spin glass on a hierarchical lattice, employing real-space renormalization group techniques to address the critical behavior and stability of the spin glass phase under a magnetic field.
5. The study focuses on the Hopfield model with correlated patterns, employing replica theory and statistical mechanics to address the effect of pattern correlations on the network's retrieval phases and storage capacity.

| 1 | **[Observation of field-odd and field-free superconducting diode effects in $\mathrm{Mo}_2\mathrm{C}$ nanoflakes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19525v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The superconducting diode effect (SDE) enables nonreciprocal supercurrent flow, holding immense potential for ultra-low-power quantum electronics. Intrinsic SDE typically requires materials with inherent symmetry breakings. Here, we report the discovery of SDE in chemical vapor deposition-grown molybdenum carbide ($\mathrm{Mo}_2\mathrm{C}$) nanoflakes, a material traditionally considered centrosymmetric. Strikingly, this system uniquely hosts both field-odd and field-free SDEs. Transport measurements reveal a field-odd SDE with tunable efficiency exceeding 40% at 4 K under a perpendicular in-plane magnetic field. In a separate sample, a robust field-free SDE persists under zero-field and field-coolings. Out-of-plane field sweeps confirm the intrinsic nature of these phenomena. We propose that domain-boundary supercurrents or charge density wave-like orders drive this unexpected combination of symmetry breakings. Our findings establish air-stable $\mathrm{Mo}_2\mathrm{C}$ as an ideal platform for nonreciprocal superconducting electronics operating at liquid-helium temperatures, expanding the search for SDE into nominally centrosymmetric superconductors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导二极管效应(SDE)可实现非互易超导电流，在超低功耗量子电子学中具有巨大潜力。本征SDE通常需要具有固有对称性破缺的材料。本文报道了在化学气相沉积生长的碳化钼($\mathrm{Mo}_2\mathrm{C}$)纳米薄片中发现的SDE，该材料传统上被认为是中心对称的。引人注目的是，该系统独特地同时存在场奇SDE和无场SDE。输运测量揭示了在面内垂直磁场下，4 K时场奇SDE的可调效率超过40%。在另一独立样品中，稳健的无场SDE在零场和场冷却条件下持续存在。面外磁场扫描证实了这些现象的本征特性。我们提出，畴边界超电流或电荷密度波序驱动了这种意想不到的对称性破缺组合。我们的研究确立了空气稳定的$\mathrm{Mo}_2\mathrm{C}$作为在液氦温度下运行的非互易超导电子学的理想平台，并将SDE的探索扩展至名义上的中心对称超导体。</p></details> | 2026-04-21 | Wei Gao et al. |
| 2 | **[Bulk superconductivity up to 96 K in pressurized nickelate single crystals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.14584v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Recently, the Ruddlesden-Popper bilayer nickelate $La_3Ni_2O_7$ has emerged as a superconductor with a transition temperature ($T_c$) of approximately 80 K above 14 GPa (Refs. 1-3). Achieving higher $T_c$ in nickelate superconductors, along with the synthesis of reproducible high-quality single crystals without relying on high-oxygen-pressure growth conditions, remains a significant challenge$^{[4-7]}$. Here we report superconductivity up to 96 K under high pressure in bilayer nickelate single crystals synthesized at ambient pressure. Energy-dispersive spectroscopy, single-crystal X-ray diffraction, nuclear quadrupole resonance and scanning transmission electron microscopy evidenced high crystal quality of the flux-grown $La_2SmNi_2O_{7-δ}$ single crystals. $La_2SmNi_2O_7$ exhibits clear bulk superconductivity, including zero resistivity ($T_{c,max}^{onset}$ = 92 K and $T_{c,max}^{zero}$ = 73 K at 21.6 GPa) and the Meissner effect ($T_c$= 60 K at 20.6 GPa). A low-temperature high-pressure structural study indicates that both monoclinic and tetragonal structures can support superconductivity in this bilayer nickelate. Furthermore, we established a correlation between higher $T_c$ under high pressures and larger in-plane lattice distortion under ambient conditions, corroborated by observing even higher $T_c^{onset}$ of 96 K in $La_{1.57}Sm_{1.43}Ni_2O_{7-δ}$. This study overcomes key limitations in growing nickelate superconductor crystals, resolves the crystal structure in the superconducting state and demonstrates an effective pathway towards achieving higher $T_c$.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近期，Ruddlesden-Popper双层镍酸盐$La_3Ni_2O_7$作为一种超导体出现，其在14 GPa以上具有约80 K的转变温度($T_c$)(参考文献1-3)。在镍酸盐超导体中实现更高的$T_c$，以及在不依赖高氧压生长条件的情况下合成可重复的高质量单晶，仍然是一个重大挑战$^{[4-7]}$。本文报道了在常压下合成的双层镍酸盐单晶中，高压下高达96 K的超导电性。能量色散谱、单晶X射线衍射、核四极共振和扫描透射电子显微镜证实了助熔剂法生长的$La_2SmNi_2O_{7-δ}$单晶具有高质量晶体结构。$La_2SmNi_2O_7$表现出明确的体超导电性，包括零电阻($T_{c,max}^{onset}$ = 92 K，$T_{c,max}^{zero}$ = 73 K，21.6 GPa下)和迈斯纳效应($T_c$= 60 K，20.6 GPa下)。低温高压结构研究表明，单斜和四方结构均能支持该双层镍酸盐的超导电性。此外，我们建立了高压下更高$T_c$与常压下更大面内晶格畸变之间的关联，并在$La_{1.57}Sm_{1.43}Ni_2O_{7-δ}$中观察到高达96 K的$T_c^{onset}$进一步证实了这一点。本研究克服了生长镍酸盐超导体晶体的关键限制，解析了超导态的晶体结构，并展示了一条实现更高$T_c$的有效途径。</p></details> | 2026-04-21 | Feiyu Li et al. |
| 3 | **[Competing Constraints on Superconductivity in Thick FeSe films](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19443v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting films emerge from the complex interplay of multiple growth parameters, making their optimization challenging. In iron-based superconductors, compressive strain is known to enhance the transition temperature (Tc) of FeSe films, yet reported Tc values vary widely even on identical substrates, indicating factors beyond strain are critical. Here, we develop a high-throughput off-center pulsed laser deposition strategy that transforms plume inhomogeneity into combinatorial FeSe film libraries with continuous gradients in lattice parameter, composition, and disorder. We discover that the maximum Tc does not coincide with the plume center but can shift off-center, revealing a competition between favorable c-axis expansion, stoichiometry, and defect scattering. Systematic characterization of 80 thick films (>50 nm), combined with interpretable machine learning, shows that besides the strong correlate of c-axis lattice parameter to Tc, the stoichiometry and disorder scattering impose critical constraints on the achievable transition temperature, defining a narrow optimization window rather than a simple monotonic relationship. This framework yields Tconset=17.1 K in thick FeSe films and establishes a general framework combining combinatorial synthesis with machine learning to uncover constrained optimization landscapes in complex functional materials.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导薄膜的形成源于多个生长参数之间复杂的相互作用，使其优化具有挑战性。在铁基超导体中，压应变已知可提高FeSe薄膜的转变温度(Tc)，但即使在相同衬底上，报道的Tc值也存在很大差异，这表明应变之外的因素至关重要。本文开发了一种高通量偏心脉冲激光沉积策略，将羽辉不均匀性转化为具有连续梯度变化的晶格参数、成分和无序度的组合FeSe薄膜库。我们发现最大Tc并不出现在羽辉中心，而是可能偏移至偏心位置，揭示了有利的c轴膨胀、化学计量比和缺陷散射之间的竞争。对80个厚膜(>50 nm)的系统表征，结合可解释的机器学习表明，除了c轴晶格参数与Tc的强相关性外，化学计量比和无序散射对可实现的转变温度施加了关键限制，定义了一个狭窄的优化窗口，而非简单的单调关系。该框架在厚FeSe薄膜中实现了Tconset=17.1 K，并建立了一个将组合合成与机器学习相结合的通用框架，以揭示复杂功能材料中的约束优化图景。</p></details> | 2026-04-21 | Ya-Xun He et al. |
| 4 | **[Superconducting properties of the three-dimensional Hofstadter-Hubbard model below the critical flux for Weyl points](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19332v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The three-dimensional Hofstadter model exhibits a critical rational flux at which Weyl points emerge in the single-particle spectrum. We study the superconducting regime of the model in the presence of a Hubbard attractive interaction by tuning the magnetic flux across its critical value. We determine the phase diagram in the plane of the coprime pairs parametrizing the magnetic flux. We show that the system exhibits two distinct regimes separated by a critical flux $Φ_c$: for $Φ>Φ_c$, a semimetal-to-superconductor quantum phase transition occurs at a finite interaction strength ($U_c\neq0$), while for $Φ<Φ_c$ superconductivity arises for arbitrarily weak attraction, with a BCS-like exponential scaling of the gap due to the finiteness of the density of states. Close to the transition, we study the scaling behavior and identify the critical exponents. Our results highlight the interplay between magnetic band topology and attractive pairing in three-dimensional Hofstadter systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>三维Hofstadter模型在单粒子谱中表现出一个临界有理磁通，在此处外尔点出现。我们通过调节磁通穿越其临界值，研究了该模型在存在哈伯德吸引相互作用下的超导区域。我们确定了以参数化磁通的互质对为平面的相图。我们表明系统表现出由临界磁通$Φ_c$分隔的两个不同区域：对于$Φ>Φ_c$，在有限相互作用强度($U_c\neq0$)下发生半金属到超导体的量子相变；而对于$Φ<Φ_c$，超导电性在任意弱吸引下出现，由于态密度的有限性，能隙具有类似BCS的指数标度。在转变附近，我们研究了标度行为并确定了临界指数。我们的结果突出了三维Hofstadter系统中磁能带拓扑与吸引配对之间的相互作用。</p></details> | 2026-04-21 | Pierpaolo Fontana et al. |
| 5 | **[Unveiling the Superconducting Ground State of Heusler alloy Pd2ZrIn via muon spin relaxation and rotation measurement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19283v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Full Heusler alloys XInPd2 (X= Zr, Hf and Ti) have recently attracted significant attention owing to their symmetry-driven electronic structure and also due to the interplay between disorder and emergent ground states. Within this family, Pd2ZrIn serves as a unique platform to study the effect of disorder on superconducting pairing. This alloy crystallizes in a cubic L21 structure with significant B2-type antisite disorder. Electrical resistivity and magnetic susceptibility studies confirm bulk type-II superconductivity with a transition temperature TC ~ 2.2 K. Zero-field μSR results reveal no evidence of spontaneous internal magnetic fields below TC, confirming the preservation of time-reversal symmetry. Transverse-field μSR spectra show the formation of a vortex lattice, consistent with type-II superconductivity, and the superfluid density is well described by a fully gapped, nodeless s-wave state with superconducting gap Δ (0) ~ 0.33 \pm 0.01 meV. Furthermore, the estimated ratio of transition temperature and Fermi temperature (TC/TF) indicates that this alloy lies within the conventional superconducting regime on the Uemura plot. These results establish Pd2ZrIn as a weakly coupled, dirty-limit, type-II superconductor; with a fully gapped, nodeless order parameter and preserved time-reversal symmetry.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>全赫斯勒合金XInPd2 (X= Zr, Hf和Ti)近期因其对称性驱动的电子结构以及无序与演生基态之间的相互作用而受到广泛关注。在该家族中，Pd2ZrIn作为研究无序对超导配对影响的独特平台。该合金结晶为立方L21结构，并具有显著的B2型反位无序。电阻率和磁化率研究证实了其体II型超导电性，转变温度TC ~ 2.2 K。零场μSR结果显示在TC以下没有自发内磁场的证据，证实了时间反演对称性的保持。横向场μSR谱显示了涡旋晶格的形成，与II型超导电性一致，并且超流密度可以用一个完全能隙、无节点的s波态很好地描述，其超导能隙Δ (0) ~ 0.33 \pm 0.01 meV。此外，估计的转变温度与费米温度之比(TC/TF)表明，该合金在Uemura图上位于常规超导区域。这些结果确立了Pd2ZrIn是一种弱耦合、脏极限的II型超导体，具有完全能隙、无节点的序参量，并保持了时间反演对称性。</p></details> | 2026-04-21 | Kavita Yadav et al. |
| 6 | **[Universal Criterion and Graph-Theoretic Construction of Intrinsic Superconducting Diode Effect](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04876v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The intrinsic superconducting diode effect (SDE) is distinguished from the Josephson diode effect (JDE) by its manifestation of nonreciprocal critical current phenomena within a monolithic superconductor, typically linked to finite-momentum Cooper pairing. The long-standing assumption that SDE requires co-breaking of time-reversal and inversion symmetries proves to be necessary but not sufficient. In this work, we propose a universal diagnostic criterion for intrinsic SDE, expressed as two inequalities evaluated directly from the bare Hamiltonian. This criterion further reveals a graph-theoretic construction for nonreciprocal models, offering design principles that extend beyond superconductivity.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>本征超导二极管效应区别于约瑟夫森二极管效应的特征在于，其非互易临界电流现象出现在单一超导体内部，通常与有限动量的库珀对相关联。长期以来认为该效应需要同时破坏时间反演对称性和空间反演对称性的假设，被证明是必要但不充分的条件。本工作中，我们提出了一个普适的本征超导二极管效应诊断判据，该判据表示为可直接从裸哈密顿量计算的两个不等式。此判据进一步揭示了非互易模型的图论构造方法，提供了可超越超导领域的通用设计原则。</p></details> | 2026-04-21 | Ran Wang et al. |
| 7 | **[Wave--particle transition and quantum Zeno effect in which-way experiments with a superconducting quantum processor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19115v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Wave--particle duality demonstrates the peculiar nature of quantum mechanics. In which-way experiments, depending on the measurement scheme, a particle exhibits either wave-like or particle-like properties, as summarized by Bohr's principle of complementarity. In this work, we implement Mach-Zehnder (MZ) interferometry on a two-dimensional (2D) superconducting quantum processor. With precise control of the which-way measurement strength, we demonstrate the transition of a photon from wave-like to particle-like behavior. Furthermore, by performing quantum state tomography on two qubits located in the two paths, we demonstrate that which-way measurements break the entanglement and coherence between the two paths and cause information leakage from the quantum system to the environment. To capture this behavior quantitatively, we derive complementarity relations between the entropy and the fringe visibility. By applying a continuous which-way measurement during the evolution, we also observe the quantum Zeno effect that partially obstructs the interferometer path, giving rise to nonmonotonic behavior of purity and von Neumann entropy. Our experiments provide a detailed characterization of the full interferometer dynamics, reveal the relation between wave--particle duality and quantum information, and demonstrate the potential of superconducting quantum processors for testing quantum foundations under high precision and controllability.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>波粒二象性揭示了量子力学的奇特本质。在"哪条路径"实验中，依据测量方案的不同，粒子会表现出波动性或粒子性，这被玻尔的互补性原理所概括。本工作中，我们在二维超导量子处理器上实现了马赫-曾德尔干涉测量。通过对路径探测强度的精确调控，我们展示了光子从波动性到粒子性的行为转变。进一步，通过对两条路径上的两个量子比特进行量子态层析，我们证明了路径探测会破坏路径间的纠缠与相干性，并导致量子系统向环境的信息泄露。为定量描述该行为，我们推导了熵与条纹可见度之间的互补关系。通过在演化过程中施加连续路径探测，我们还观测到部分阻碍干涉路径的量子芝诺效应，引发了纯度和冯·诺依曼熵的非单调行为。我们的实验完整表征了干涉仪动力学过程，揭示了波粒二象性与量子信息间的关联，并展示了超导量子处理器在高精度可控条件下检验量子基础理论的潜力。</p></details> | 2026-04-21 | Shiyu Wang et al. |
| 8 | **[Memory-Dominated Quantum Criticality as a Universal Route to High-Temperature Superconductivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.22626v6)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Understanding the dynamical origin of high-temperature superconductivity remains a central challenge in strongly correlated quantum matter. Near quantum criticality, diverging correlation times invalidate a quasiparticle description and instead lead to scale-free dynamics governed by a continuum of relaxation processes. We show that the infrared behavior of interacting electrons is generically controlled by the relaxation-rate spectrum of the underlying many-body dynamics. Starting from a microscopic fermionic theory, we derive that the Cooper-channel kernel admits a universal spectral representation in terms of the time-scale density of states (TDOS) of collective decay modes, without invoking a specific bosonic mediator. The superconducting instability follows directly from the vanishing of the quadratic kernel via a standard ladder resummation and Thouless criterion, with the pairing interaction determined entirely by the infrared structure of the relaxation spectrum. A finite TDOS at vanishing relaxation rate produces a memory-dominated regime characterized by long-time kernels $K(t)\sim 1/t$ and logarithmic enhancement of the retarded pairing interaction, leading to a BCS-like exponential transition scale set by infrared spectral weight. More generally, infrared-singular spectra generate power-law response and algebraic enhancement of the transition scale. The same relaxation spectrum controls normal-state dynamics, giving rise to long-time correlations, non-Markovian response, and strange-metal behavior. These results identify the spectral organization of relaxation modes as a universal organizing principle of quantum critical matter and establish memory-dominated criticality as a natural mechanism for enhanced pairing.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>理解高温超导性的动力学起源始终是强关联量子物质研究的核心挑战。在量子临界点附近，发散的关联时间使准粒子描述失效，转而导致由连续弛豫过程主导的无标度动力学。我们发现相互作用电子的红外行为普遍受底层多体动力学弛豫率谱的控制。从微观费米子理论出发，我们推导出库珀通道核函数允许用集体衰减模式的时间尺度态密度进行普适谱表示，而无需引入特定玻色媒介。超导不稳定性直接通过标准梯形图重求和与Thouless判据从二次核函数的零点产生，其配对相互作用完全由弛豫谱的红外结构决定。零弛豫率处有限的时间尺度态密度会产生记忆主导区域，其特征为长时核函数K(t)∼1/t以及推迟配对相互作用的对数增强，从而导致由红外谱权重设定的类BCS指数过渡标度。更一般地，红外奇异谱会产生幂律响应和过渡标度的代数增强。同一弛豫谱控制着正常态动力学，引发出长时关联、非马尔可夫响应和奇异金属行为。这些结果将弛豫模式的谱结构确立为量子临界物质的普适组织原则，并建立记忆主导临界性作为增强配对的自然机制。</p></details> | 2026-04-21 | Byung Gyu Chae et al. |
| 9 | **[Superconductivity in Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates: a review of recent progress, focusing on thin films](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18385v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The discovery of superconductivity with Tc ~ 80 K in the nickelate Ruddlesden-Popper bilayer La3Ni2O7 at high pressure has opened a new platform for unconventional superconductivity, followed by the subsequent observation of superconductivity in trilayer La4Ni3O10, also at high pressure. Remarkably, ambient-pressure superconductivity was also observed recently in La3Ni2O7 ultra-thin films when grown on substrates that provide compressive strain. This discovery significantly extends the type of experimental techniques that can be used in nickelates, previously limited due to the high-pressure constraint. Discussing the similarities and differences among these nickel oxides will provide new insights into understanding the mechanism of high-Tc superconductivity in correlated electron systems. In this paper, we review the experimental and theoretical progress on RuddlesdenPopper nickelates, with emphasis on thin films, and discuss future perspectives and research directions.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在高压下镍酸盐Ruddlesden-Popper双层结构La3Ni2O7中发现Tc~80 K的超导电性，为非常规超导研究开辟了新平台，随后在三层结构La4Ni3O10中也观测到高压超导。值得注意的是，近期在提供压缩应变的衬底上生长的La3Ni2O7超薄膜中，同样观测到了常压超导电性。这一发现显著拓展了可用于镍酸盐研究的实验技术类型，此前因高压限制而受限。探讨这些镍氧化物之间的异同，将为理解关联电子体系中高温超导机制提供新见解。本文综述了Ruddlesden-Popper结构镍酸盐的实验与理论进展，重点讨论薄膜体系，并对未来前景和研究方向进行展望。</p></details> | 2026-04-21 | Yang Zhang et al. |
| 10 | **[Stripping Symmetry: Electrochemical Oxidation to a Superconducting Polar Metal in Au2Pb0.914P2](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18843v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Polar metals and noncentrosymmetric superconductors are exceptionally rare, yet their broken inversion symmetry can give rise to emergent electronic phenomena including mixed singlet-triplet superconducting pairing. As only a few such materials have been found among known compounds, accessing new examples requires synthetic strategies that go beyond conventional crystal growth. Here, we use electrochemical topotactic deintercalation to remove Pb from the centrosymmetric parent compound Au$_2$PbP$_2$, producing the polar metal Au$_2$Pb$_{0.914}$P$_2$. Unlike conventional chemical doping, this transformation actively drives structural symmetry-breaking: the partial removal of Pb triggers a cooperative electronic and geometric rearrangement, mediated by a second-order Jahn-Teller effect and stereochemically active lone pairs, that locks the product into a polar, noncentrosymmetric superspace group Ama2(01g)ss0. We solve the complete (3+1)D modulated structure by synchrotron single-crystal X-ray diffraction and confirm the polar assignment through nonlinear electronic transport. Below T$_c$ = 1.52 K, Au$_2$Pb$_{0.914}$P$_2$ becomes a type-II superconductor whose heat capacity and AC susceptibility both exhibit power-law behavior, suggestive of a gap structure governed by the broken inversion symmetry of the host lattice. This work establishes electrochemical oxidation as a rational route to metastable noncentrosymmetric superconductors through chemically directed symmetry-breaking.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>极性金属与非中心对称超导体极为罕见，但其破缺的反演对称性可引发包括混合自旋单态-三重态超导配对在内的新兴电子现象。由于已知化合物中仅发现少数此类材料，获取新范例需要超越传统晶体生长的合成策略。本文采用电化学拓扑化学脱嵌法从中心对称母体化合物Au$_2$PbP$_2$中移除Pb，制备出极性金属Au$_2$Pb$_{0.914}$P$_2$。与传统化学掺杂不同，此转变主动驱动结构对称性破缺：Pb的部分移除通过二阶Jahn-Teller效应和立体化学活性孤对电子介导，引发协同的电子与几何重构，将产物锁定在极性非中心对称超空间群Ama2(01g)ss0中。我们通过同步辐射单晶X射线衍射解析了完整的(3+1)维调制结构，并通过非线性电子输运证实极性归属。在T$_c$=1.52 K以下，Au$_2$Pb$_{0.914}$P$_2$转变为II型超导体，其热容和交流磁化率均呈现幂律行为，暗示其能隙结构受晶格破缺反演对称性支配。本工作确立了电化学氧化法作为通过化学定向对称破缺制备亚稳态非中心对称超导体的理性途径。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Scott B. Lee et al. |
| 11 | **[Competition and coexistence of superconductivity and nematic order in a two-dimensional electron gas with quadrupolar interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18777v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate the interplay between superconductivity and nematic order in a two-dimensional electron gas with competing pairing and quadrupolar forward-scattering interactions. The model includes both $s$-wave and $d$-wave superconducting channels. We compute the mean-field free energy density and determine the phase diagrams as functions of interaction strengths and temperature by solving a set of coupled self-consistent equations. At zero-temperature, we find that the nematic order competes strongly with $d$-wave superconductivity, leading to a direct first-order phase transition, while its interplay with $s$-wave pairing allows for a coexistence phase characterized by an anisotropic Fermi surface with a uniform superconducting gap. At finite-temperatures, quadrupolar interactions promote the emergence of additional superconducting components, giving rise to regimes where $s$-wave, $d$-wave, and nematic orders coexist. Our results highlight the role of symmetry and interaction strength in shaping the phase structure and provide a minimal framework to describe intertwined nematic and superconducting phases in correlated electron systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了具有竞争性配对与四极向前散射相互作用的二维电子气中，超导性与向列序之间的相互作用。该模型同时包含s波和d波超导通道。我们计算了平均场自由能密度，并通过求解一组耦合自洽方程，确定了作为相互作用强度和温度函数的相图。在零温下，我们发现向列序与d波超导性强烈竞争，导致直接的一级相变；而其与s波配对的相互作用则允许存在一个共存相，该相的特征是具有各向异性费米面和均匀的超导能隙。在有限温度下，四极相互作用促进了额外超导分量的出现，从而产生了s波、d波和向列序共存的区域。我们的结果突显了对称性和相互作用强度在塑造相结构中的作用，并提供了一个描述关联电子系统中交织的向列序与超导相的最小框架。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Nei Lopes et al. |
| 12 | **[Magnetism and symmetry of superconducting gap in LaFeAsO from dynamical mean-field theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18582v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>By employing a combined method of density functional theory and dynamical mean field theory (DFT+DMFT) we investigate the effect of electronic correlations on the magnetic and superconducting properties of the iron-based parent compound LaFeAsO. We find that the static non-local susceptibility $χ({\bf q})$ exhibits a peak at the in-plane wave vector ${\mathbf Q}=(π,π)$, which is strongly enhanced upon inclusion of the vertex corrections in the ladder approximation, leading to magnetic instability. Considering the eigenfunctions of the Bethe-Salpeter equation with the vertex, obtained within the second order perturbation theory, as well as the ladder approach containing dynamic interaction vertices, in agreement with earlier weak-coupling-based studies of LaFeAsO, we obtain a close competition between $d$-wave and $s_{\pm}$ order parameters, dominating in the second-order and ladder approach, respectively. We argue that the dominating $s_{\pm}$ instability in the ladder DFT+DMFT approach is related to the reduced degree of magnetic frustration by itinerant degrees of freedom due to only partially formed local magnetic moments. Our study shows that dynamic correlation effects do not change the type of the leading superconducting instability in LaFeAsO.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>通过结合密度泛函理论与动力学平均场理论（DFT+DMFT）的方法，我们研究了电子关联效应对铁基母体化合物LaFeAsO磁性和超导性质的影响。我们发现，静态非局域磁化率$χ({\bf q})$在面内波矢${\mathbf Q}=(π,π)$处出现峰值，该峰值在梯子近似中包含顶点修正后显著增强，从而导致磁不稳定性。考虑在二阶微扰论中获得的、包含顶点的Bethe-Salpeter方程的本征函数，以及包含动态相互作用顶点的梯子方法，我们得到了$d$波和$s_{\pm}$序参量之间的激烈竞争，它们分别在二阶方法和梯子方法中占主导地位。这与早期基于弱耦合理论对LaFeAsO的研究结果一致。我们认为，在梯子DFT+DMFT方法中占主导的$s_{\pm}$不稳定性，与由于局域磁矩仅部分形成、巡游自由度降低了磁挫败程度有关。我们的研究表明，动态关联效应并未改变LaFeAsO中主导超导不稳定性的类型。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | S. L. Skornyakov et al. |
| 13 | **[Photo-induced superconducting diode effect via chiral cavity modes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.17924v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Time reversal symmetry breaking is an important facet of controlling nonreciprocal responses. Here, we propose a method of photo-control over superconducting diode-like nonreciprocities, where time reversal symmetry breaking is achieved via photon exchange with chiral cavity modes. We reveal the origin of the nonreciprocal superconducting response as the embedding of chirality in a many-body ground state through photon induced orbital magnetization. With twisted bilayer graphene (TBG) as an example, we demonstrate the general principles of photo-control of diode responses, which are valid for a wide range of superconductors and cavity designs. The cavity control of superconducting nonreciprocities, particularly in the microwave regime, offers a non-invasive means of exploring new functionalities in quantum circuits with ultrafast switching and on-chip integration. This control method can serve as an important contribution to the toolbox for nonreciprocal models in circuit quantum electrodynamics, primed to be harnessed for scalable and modular quantum devices.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>时间反演对称性破缺是控制非互易响应的一个重要方面。在此，我们提出了一种通过光控实现类超导二极管非互易性的方法，其中时间反演对称性破缺是通过与手性腔模交换光子实现的。我们揭示了非互易超导响应的根源在于，通过光子诱导的轨道磁化将手性嵌入多体基态。以扭转双层石墨烯（TBG）为例，我们阐述了光控二极管响应的通用原理，这些原理适用于广泛的超导体和腔体设计。对超导非互易性（特别是在微波波段）的腔体控制，为探索量子电路的新功能（如超快切换和片上集成）提供了一种非侵入性手段。这种控制方法可作为电路量子电动力学中非互易模型工具箱的重要补充，有望用于可扩展和模块化的量子器件。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Arpit Arora et al. |
| 14 | **[Nonreciprocal quantum information processing with superconducting diodes in circuit quantum electrodynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.20758v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Introducing new components and functionalities into quantum devices is critical in advancing state-of-the-art hardware. Here, we propose superconducting diodes (SDs) as a coherent nonreciprocal element in circuit quantum electrodynamics (cQED) architectures. In particular, we use an asymmetric SQUID as an SD controlled with a flux bias - nonreciprocal element with single control handle and on-chip modality. We spectroscopically characterize SD and show that flux bias acts cooperatively with the nonlinear diode response to induce direction-dependent resonance shifts in the transmission spectrum. We show that even with modest diode efficiency the isolation isolation ratio is sufficiently high, and scales with multiple SDs. We demonstrate the use of the SD as a coupler to realize coherent nonreciprocal qubit-qubit coupling. With a minimal two qubit system, we demonstrate nonreciprocal half-iSWAP, thereby showcasing the potential of intrinsic nonreciprocity as a tool to perform arbitrary two-qubit gates. Our work enables high-fidelity signal routing and entanglement generation in all-to-all connected microwave quantum networks, where nonreciprocity is embedded at the device level.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>将新组件和功能引入量子器件对于推进最先进的硬件至关重要。在此，我们提出将超导二极管作为电路量子电动力学架构中的一种相干非互易元件。具体而言，我们使用一个不对称的SQUID作为超导二极管，通过磁通偏置进行控制——这是一种具有单一控制手柄和片上模态的非互易元件。我们通过光谱学方法表征了超导二极管，并表明磁通偏置与非线性二极管响应协同作用，在传输谱中诱导出方向依赖的共振频移。我们证明，即使二极管效率一般，其隔离度也足够高，并且可通过多个超导二极管级联提升。我们展示了将超导二极管用作耦合器以实现相干非互易量子比特-量子比特耦合。在一个最小的双量子比特系统中，我们演示了非互易的半iSWAP操作，从而展示了本征非互易性作为执行任意双量子比特门工具的潜力。我们的工作能够在全连接的微波量子网络中实现高保真度的信号路由和纠缠生成，其中非互易性被嵌入到器件层面。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Nicolas Dirnegger et al. |
| 15 | **[Direct Fabrication of a Superconducting Two-Dimensional Electron Gas on KTaO3(111) via Mg-Induced Surface Reduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.18944v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Two-dimensional electron gases (2DEGs) at the surfaces of KTaO3 have become an exciting platform for exploring strong spin-orbit coupling, Rashba physics, and low-carrier-density superconductivity. Yet, a large fraction of reported KTaO3-based 2DEGs has been realized through chemically complex overlayers that both generate carriers and can obscure the native electronic structure, making spectroscopic access to the underlying 2DEG challenging. Here, we demonstrate a simple and direct method to generate a superconducting 2DEG on KTaO3(111) using Mg-induced surface reduction in molecular-beam epitaxy (MBE). Mg has an extremely low sticking coefficient at elevated temperatures, enabling the formation of an ultrathin (less than 1-2 monolayers) MgO layer that is transparent to soft x-ray photoemission spectroscopy (XPS) and angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES). This allows direct measurement of the surface chemistry and low-energy electronic structure of the pristine reduced surface without the need for a several-nanometer-thick capping layer. XPS shows clear reduction of Ta5+ to lower oxidation states, while ARPES reveals a parabolic Ta 5d conduction band with an approximately 150 meV bandwidth and additional subband features arising from quantum confinement. Transport measurements confirm a superconducting transition below 0.7 K. Together, these results demonstrate a chemically straightforward and controllable pathway for fabricating spectroscopically accessible superconducting 2DEGs on KTaO3(111), and provide a powerful new platform for investigating the mechanisms underlying orientation-dependent superconductivity in KTaO3-based oxide interfaces.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>KTaO3表面的二维电子气（2DEG）已成为探索强自旋轨道耦合、Rashba物理和低载流子密度超导性的激动人心的平台。然而，已报道的大部分基于KTaO3的二维电子气是通过化学结构复杂的覆盖层实现的，这些覆盖层既能产生载流子，也可能掩盖本征的电子结构，使得对底层二维电子气进行光谱学探测具有挑战性。在此，我们展示了一种在KTaO3(111)上利用分子束外延（MBE）中Mg诱导的表面还原来生成超导二维电子气的简单直接方法。Mg在高温下具有极低的粘附系数，从而能够形成对软X射线光电子能谱（XPS）和角分辨光电子能谱（ARPES）透明的超薄（小于1-2个单层）MgO层。这使得无需数纳米厚的覆盖层即可直接测量原始还原表面的表面化学性质和低能电子结构。XPS显示Ta5+被明显还原为较低氧化态，而ARPES则揭示了一个带宽约150 meV的抛物线型Ta 5d导带，以及由量子限域效应产生的额外子带特征。输运测量证实了低于0.7 K的超导转变。这些结果共同证明了一种化学上简单且可控的途径，用于在KTaO3(111)上制备可进行光谱学探测的超导二维电子气，并为研究KTaO3基氧化物界面中与取向相关的超导机制提供了一个强大的新平台。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Chun Sum Brian Pang et al. |
| 16 | **[Probing Time Reversal Symmetry Breaking using a Nonlinear Superconducting Ring Resonator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.21614v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Time-reversal symmetry breaking (TRSB) has been central to detecting exotic phases of matter. Here, we leverage the circuit electrodynamics capabilities of superconducting devices to propose a novel scheme based on a multimode superconducting ring resonator for sensitive probing of TRSB in quantum materials. A ring resonator enables nonlinear cross-interactions between the modes which act as an built-in amplifiers to be harnessed for enhanced sensing. Using a driven-dissipative model, we explore the nonlinear dynamics of a two-mode superconducting circuit with self- and cross-Kerr nonlinearities under conditions near the bifurcation threshold. By mapping the optimal parameter regimes, we show that even when the photon occupation numbers are subjected to different initial conditions, they can be driven into a symmetric configuration which is broken even with weak TRSB. Through full quantum analysis we demonstrate that the Kerr-nonlinear interactions up-convert the magnetic effects of material-resonator hybrid system, enhancing the probing of TRSB. Our findings highlight the utility of superconducting microwave resonators outside of quantum information processing, as a tool for probing exotic states of matter.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>时间反演对称性破缺（TRSB）一直是探测奇异物相的核心。在此，我们利用超导器件的电路电动力学能力，提出了一种基于多模超导环形谐振器的新方案，用于灵敏探测量子材料中的时间反演对称性破缺。环形谐振器能够实现模式间的非线性交叉相互作用，这些相互作用可作为内置放大器加以利用，以增强传感能力。利用一个驱动-耗散模型，我们探索了在接近分岔阈值条件下，具有自克尔和非交叉克尔非线性的双模超导电路的非线性动力学。通过映射最优参数区间，我们表明，即使光子占据数受到不同的初始条件影响，它们也能被驱动到一个对称构型，而该构型在即使存在微弱时间反演对称性破缺时也会被打破。通过完整的量子分析，我们证明了克尔非线性相互作用能将材料-谐振器混合系统的磁效应上转换，从而增强对时间反演对称性破缺的探测。我们的发现凸显了超导微波谐振器在量子信息处理之外的用途，即作为探测奇异物质态的工具。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Nicolas Dirnegger et al. |
| 17 | **[Engineered broadband Purcell protection using a shared $Π$-filter for multiplexed superconducting qubits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18387v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We propose a broadband Purcell-protection scheme based on a single shared filter integrated directly into the feedline, enabling simultaneous protection of multiple qubits in a compact architecture with minimal hardware overhead. The filter consists of two open-ended stubs connected by an in-line transmission line, forming a $Π$ geometry, and operates via engineered passive microwave interference that suppresses the real part of the environmental admittance over a wide frequency window. Circuit simulations and finite-element modeling show strong suppression of transmission within the target band (the qubit's frequencies) while preserving the readout and reset modes of the multiplexed architecture. For realistic device parameters, the proposed design yields Purcell-limited relaxation times exceeding $1$ ms over a frequency span of approximately $1.5$ GHz, which can be further extended with straightforward modifications of the design. Our results establish the $Π$-filter as a compact and scalable solution for broadband impedance engineering in superconducting quantum circuits, compatible with standard dispersive readout protocols.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们提出了一种基于直接集成到馈线中的单个共享滤波器的宽带珀塞尔保护方案，能够在硬件开销最小化的紧凑架构中同时保护多个量子比特。该滤波器由两个通过一条直列传输线连接的开路短截线构成，形成$Π$形几何结构，并通过设计的被动微波干涉工作，在宽频率窗口内抑制环境导纳的实部。电路仿真和有限元建模显示，在目标频带（量子比特频率）内传输得到强烈抑制，同时保留了复用架构的读取和重置模式。对于实际的器件参数，所提出的设计能在约1.5 GHz的频率跨度内产生超过1 ms的珀塞尔极限弛豫时间，并且可以通过对设计的直接修改进一步扩展。我们的研究结果确立了$Π$滤波器作为一种紧凑且可扩展的解决方案，用于超导量子电路中的宽带阻抗工程，并与标准的色散读取协议兼容。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Samuel D. Escribano et al. |
| 18 | **[Fundamentals and Applications of Hybrid Electroand Opto-mechanical system coupled to Superconducting Qubit: A Short Review](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18186v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting qubits, realized by incorporating Josephson junctions into superconducting circuits, behave as artificial atoms with anharmonic energy spectra and can be precisely controlled and measured using microwave cavities within the framework of circuit quantum electrodynamics (cQED). Since its emergence in the early 2000s, cQED has established superconducting qubits as leading candidates for scalable quantum devices and has enabled the exploration of hybrid quantum systems that integrate disparate physical platformsThis review surveys superconducting hybrid quantum electromechanical systems in which mechanical resonators are coupled to superconducting qubits, with a focus on two widely used qubit platforms: the transmon and the fluxonium. We provide an overview of the underlying coupling mechanisms arising from interactions through the phase and charge degrees of freedom of the qubit, and discuss how these mechanisms give rise to both longitudinal and transverse qubit-mechanical interactions. We further review extensions of electromechanical platforms to electro-optomechanical architectures, in which optical cavities are integrated to enable coherent interfacing between superconducting circuits and optical photons. This review aims to present a unified framework and perspective on qubit-mechanical and qubit-mechanical-optical hybrid systems in superconducting quantum technologies and applications related to sensors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>通过将约瑟夫森结集成到超导电路中实现的超导量子比特，表现为具有非谐能谱的人工原子，并可在电路量子电动力学框架下利用微波腔进行精确控制和测量。自21世纪初兴起以来，cQED已确立超导量子比特作为可扩展量子器件的主要候选者，并使得探索集成不同物理平台的混合量子系统成为可能。本综述考察了机械谐振器与超导量子比特耦合的超导混合量子机电系统，重点聚焦两种广泛使用的量子比特平台：transmon和fluxonium。我们概述了源于量子比特相位和电荷自由度相互作用的底层耦合机制，并讨论了这些机制如何产生纵向和横向的量子比特-机械相互作用。我们进一步回顾了将机电平台扩展到电光机械架构的进展，其中集成了光学腔以实现超导电路与光学光子之间的相干接口。本综述旨在为超导量子技术及相关传感器应用中的量子比特-机械及量子比特-机械-光学混合系统提供一个统一的框架和视角。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Roson Nongthombam et al. |
| 19 | **[Enhanced Mid-Infrared Single-Photon Detection with Antenna-Coupled Superconducting Nanowires](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18155v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Scaling the photon-detection area of superconducting nanowire single-photon detectors (SNSPDs) has traditionally been achieved by nanowire meandering. However, material inhomogeneities and fabrication-induced defects, such as line-edge roughness, increase with nanowire length, leading to reduced internal photon-detection efficiency and elevated dark-count rates. This trade-off becomes increasingly pronounced as nanowires are scaled to sub-100 nm widths and sub-5 nm thicknesses required for mid- to far-infrared sensitivity. Here, we demonstrate an antenna-coupled SNSPD architecture that enhances the effective photon-detection area without increasing nanowire length. A crossed bowtie antenna integrated with an 80 nm-wide, 3 nm-thick WSi nanowire yields 15.7$\times$ increase in effective detection area at 7.4 $μ$m compared to a bare nanowire of identical geometric footprint, while maintaining the same internal detection efficiency and dark-count rate. Antenna coupling improves noise-equivalent power and provides a more scalable route to increasing photon-detection area than conventional meander geometries, offering performance benefits for applications in astronomy, biological imaging, and molecular spectroscopy.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>传统上，超导纳米线单光子探测器的光子探测区域面积扩展是通过纳米线蜿蜒结构实现的。然而，材料不均匀性和制造引入的缺陷（如线边缘粗糙度）会随着纳米线长度的增加而增加，导致内部光子探测效率降低和暗计数率升高。随着纳米线为满足中远红外灵敏度需求而缩小至亚100纳米宽度和亚5纳米厚度，这种权衡变得日益显著。本文展示了一种天线耦合的SNSPD架构，该架构在不增加纳米线长度的前提下增强了有效光子探测面积。一个交叉领结天线与一条80纳米宽、3纳米厚的WSi纳米线集成，在7.4微米波长处，相比具有相同几何占位的裸纳米线，其有效探测面积增加了15.7倍，同时保持了相同的内部探测效率和暗计数率。天线耦合改善了噪声等效功率，并提供了一条比传统蜿蜒几何结构更具可扩展性的增加光子探测面积的途径，为天文学、生物成像和分子光谱学等应用带来了性能优势。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Dip Joti Paul et al. |
| 20 | **[Chiral finite-momentum superconductivity in the tetralayer graphene](https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.07145v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Motivated by the recent experimental discovery of superconductivity in rhombohedral tetralayer graphene, we investigate the pairing mechanism arising from the density-density interactions within the random-phase approximation. This approach successfully highlights the dominance of the chiral $p$-wave pairing between electrons with the same spin and valley index at low densities, while also predicting the superconducting range in agreement with experimental findings. Furthermore, we examine the characteristics of distinct superconducting regions: SC1 and SC2 exhibit chiral finite-momentum superconductivity with pronounced phase fluctuations, whereas SC4 displays zero-momentum spin-singlet superconductivity.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>受最近在菱面体四层石墨烯中发现超导性的实验启发，我们在随机相位近似下研究了由密度-密度相互作用产生的配对机制。该方法成功揭示了在低密度下，具有相同自旋和谷指数的电子之间手性p波配对占主导地位，同时预测的超导范围与实验结果一致。此外，我们考察了不同超导区域的特征：SC1和SC2表现出具有显著相位涨落的手性有限动量超导性，而SC4则表现为零动量自旋单重态超导性。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Qiong Qin et al. |

### spin glass

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | **[Dynamical magnetism in the disordered cubic lattice material $γ$-${\rm Ba}_{3}{\rm CoNb}_{2}{\rm O}_{9}$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18794v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>$γ$-${\rm Ba}_{3}{\rm CoNb}_{2}{\rm O}_{9}$ realizes a disordered simple-cubic spin-$1/2$ lattice in which Co$^{2+}$ ions randomly occupy one third of the sites, placing the system close to the site-percolation threshold for magnetic order. Specific-heat, susceptibility, neutron spin-echo, and muon spin-rotation measurements reveal a broad thermodynamic crossover, short-range magnetic correlations, and persistent fast spin dynamics down to at least 0.1~K, with no evidence for static order or conventional spin-glass freezing. Monte Carlo simulations yield a broad distribution of orphan spins, finite clusters, and an infinite network. The calculated orphan-spin fraction ($\approx 8.8\%$) agrees well with the weakly correlated spin fraction inferred from magnetization ($\approx 8.2\%$). Exact diagonalization of a diluted $S = 1/2$ Heisenberg model captures the broad magnetic specific-heat anomaly and supports the coexistence of weakly and strongly correlated spin environments. These results support a picture in which spin-$1/2$ quantum fluctuations, together with dilution and proximity to the percolation threshold, can support a disorder-driven dynamical state with short-range correlations in three dimensions, distinct from both classical spin glasses and geometrically frustrated quantum spin liquids.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>$γ$-${\rm Ba}_{3}{\rm CoNb}_{2}{\rm O}_{9}$ 实现了一个无序的简单立方自旋-1/2晶格，其中 Co$^{2+}$ 离子随机占据三分之一的格点，使该系统接近磁有序的格点渗流阈值。比热、磁化率、中子自旋回波和μ子自旋旋转测量揭示了一个宽泛的热力学交叉、短程磁关联以及持续到至少 0.1~K 的快速自旋动力学，没有发现静态有序或传统自旋玻璃冻结的证据。蒙特卡洛模拟得到了孤儿自旋、有限团簇和一个无限网络的宽泛分布。计算得到的孤儿自旋比例（$\approx 8.8\%$）与从磁化强度推断出的弱关联自旋比例（$\approx 8.2\%$）吻合良好。对稀释的 $S = 1/2$ 海森堡模型进行精确对角化，再现了宽泛的磁比热异常，并支持弱关联与强关联自旋环境共存。这些结果支持了一种图像，即自旋-1/2量子涨落，连同稀释效应以及接近渗流阈值，可以在三维空间中支撑一种具有短程关联的无序驱动动力学态，该态既不同于经典自旋玻璃，也不同于几何阻挫的量子自旋液体。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Fanjun Xu et al. |
| 2 | **[Searching for emergent spacetime in spin glasses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.20902v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Recent work on algebraic formulations of holographic dualities in terms of large $N$ algebras has revealed a deep connection between the properties of the associated spectral functions and the emergence of a semiclassical spacetime and causal horizons therein. One of the main lessons is that, for a radial direction to emerge, the spectral function has to exhibit non-compact support. Furthermore, there exist conjectures upon a possible duality between complex gravitational configurations and glassy systems. The goal of this paper is to combine these ideas by studying many-body quantum-mechanical systems and assess in which parameter regimes they could potentially be holographic. Thus, we compute the spectral functions of three many-body systems with quenched disorder, the SYK model, the $p$-spin model and the SU$(M)$ Heisenberg chain in the large $N$ limit and present results in different parameter regimes. Our main finding is that in the quantum spin glass phase of the SU$(M)$ Heisenberg model, the spectral function develops an exponential tail, similar to the large $q$ limit of SYK. Furthermore, we demonstrate the presence of an infinite family of quasiparticle excitations deep in the spin liquid phase of the $p$-spin model, which could point towards an emergent type I von Neumann algebra. In addition, we demonstrate the presence of an exponential tail in the spectral function for all cases without compact support and conformal symmetry. Motivated by this observation, we prove that no low-energy operator can detect a nontrivial bulk causal structure, if the spectral function has exponentially decaying tails.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近期关于全息对偶性代数表述（基于大N代数）的研究揭示了相关谱函数性质与半经典时空及其因果视界涌现之间的深刻联系。一个重要启示是：为使径向维度涌现，谱函数必须具有非紧支撑。此外，存在关于复杂引力构型与玻璃态系统可能对偶性的猜想。本文旨在融合这些思想，通过研究多体量子力学系统并评估其在何种参数范围内可能具有全息性。为此，我们计算了三种具有淬火无序的多体系统（SYK模型、p-自旋模型和大N极限下的SU(M)海森堡链）的谱函数，并展示了不同参数区间的结果。主要发现是：在SU(M)海森堡模型的量子自旋玻璃相中，谱函数会产生指数衰减尾，类似于SYK模型的大q极限。此外，我们证明了在p-自旋模型的自旋液体相深处存在无限族的准粒子激发，这可能指向一类涌现的I型冯·诺依曼代数。另外，我们证明了在所有不具备紧支撑与共形对称性的情况下，谱函数均存在指数衰减尾。基于此观察，我们证明：若谱函数具有指数衰减尾，则任何低能算子都无法探测到非平凡的体因果结构。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Dimitris Saraidaris et al. |
| 3 | **[Replica Theory of Spherical Boltzmann Machine Ensembles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17936v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Training in machine learning generally consists in finding one model, whose parameters minimize a data-dependent loss. Yet, empirical work shows that ensemble learning, an approach in which multiple models are sampled, can improve performance. Here, we provide an analytical framework to understand these observations in the case of Boltzmann machines, exploiting a duality between ensemble learning and large deviations of the free energy in spin-glass models. Replica calculations allow us to fully solve the case of spherical Boltzmann machine ensembles, and clarify when ensemble learning improves over standard loss minimization. Our findings are corroborated by numerical simulations on deep networks. Special care is brought to the case of nearly finite-dimensional data, for which we show that replica predictions are valid for arbitrarily large number of data points compared to the (large) embedding dimension.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>机器学习训练通常旨在寻找一个能最小化数据相关损失的模型参数。然而实证研究表明，集成学习（即对多个模型进行采样的方法）能提升性能。本文针对玻尔兹曼机提出一个分析框架，利用集成学习与自旋玻璃模型中自由能大偏差之间的对偶关系来理解这些现象。通过复本计算，我们完整求解了球形玻尔兹曼机集成的情形，并阐明了集成学习在何时优于标准损失最小化方法。我们的发现得到了深度网络数值模拟的验证。针对近似有限维数据的情形，我们特别论证了：当数据点数量相对于（较大的）嵌入维度任意大时，复本预测仍然有效。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Thomas Tulinski et al. |
| 4 | **[Demonstrating Real Advantage of Machine-Learning-Enhanced Monte Carlo for Combinatorial Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.19544v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Combinatorial optimization problems are central to both practical applications and the development of optimization methods. While classical and quantum algorithms have been refined over decades, machine learning--assisted approaches are comparatively recent and have not yet consistently outperformed simple, state-of-the-art classical methods. Here, we focus on a class of Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) problems, specifically the challenge of finding minimum energy configurations in three-dimensional Ising spin glasses. We use a Global Annealing Monte Carlo algorithm that integrates standard local moves with global moves proposed via machine learning. We show that local moves play a crucial role in achieving optimal performance. Benchmarking against Simulated Annealing and Population Annealing, we demonstrate that Global Annealing not only surpasses the performance of Simulated Annealing but also exhibits greater robustness than Population Annealing, maintaining effectiveness across problem hardness and system size without hyperparameter tuning. These results provide clear and robust evidence that a machine learning--assisted optimization method can exceed the capabilities of classical state-of-the-art techniques in a combinatorial optimization setting.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>组合优化问题在实践应用和优化方法发展中均处于核心地位。尽管经典与量子算法历经数十年发展已日趋完善，但机器学习辅助方法相对较新，且尚未能稳定超越简单的经典前沿方法。本文聚焦于一类二次无约束二进制优化问题，特别是三维伊辛自旋玻璃中寻找最小能量构型的挑战。我们采用一种全局退火蒙特卡洛算法，该算法将标准局部移动与通过机器学习提出的全局移动相结合。研究表明，局部移动对实现最优性能至关重要。通过与模拟退火和群体退火进行基准测试，我们证明全局退火不仅性能超越模拟退火，而且比群体退火更具鲁棒性——无需超参数调优即可在不同问题难度和系统规模下保持有效性。这些结果为机器学习辅助优化方法在组合优化场景中能够超越经典前沿技术提供了清晰而坚实的证据。</p></details> | 2026-04-19 | Luca Maria Del Bono et al. |
| 5 | **[Dynamics of spin glasses in two dimensions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13480v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Spin glass dynamics is a strong function of spatial dimensionality $D$. The lower critical dimension is close to 2.5, so that, in two dimensions, the condensation temperature $T_\text{g}=0$, and only fluctuations are present at finite temperatures. However, by using thin film multilayers, one can explore the dynamics in both $D=3$ and $D=2$ dimensions. Spin glass thin film multilayers transition from $D=3$ dynamics at short to intermediate times to $D = 2$ dynamics at long times. Correlation lengths of CuMn 4.5 nm multilayers at long times are shown to be grow more rapidly in $D=2$ as compared to $D=3$, and for the longest measurement time, experimentally reach equilibrium in qualitative agreement with simulations.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>自旋玻璃动力学是空间维度$D$的强函数。其下临界维度接近2.5，因此在二维情况下，凝聚温度$T_\text{g}=0$，有限温度下仅存在涨落。然而，通过使用薄膜多层结构，可以同时探索$D=3$和$D=2$维度的动力学。自旋玻璃薄膜多层结构的动力学在短到中等时间尺度上表现为$D=3$特性，而在长时间尺度上过渡到$D=2$特性。研究表明，CuMn 4.5 nm多层结构在长时间尺度下的关联长度在$D=2$中比在$D=3$中增长得更快，并且在最长的测量时间内，实验上达到了平衡，这与模拟结果在定性上一致。</p></details> | 2026-04-17 | Hongze Li et al. |
| 6 | **[The Phase Transitions in a $p$ spin Glass Model: A Numerical Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15433v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate the balanced $M=4$, $p=4$ spin-glass model for a one-dimensional long-range proxy for the finite dimensional short-range $p$-spin glass model to examine the nature of the glass transition beyond mean-field theory. We perform large-scale Monte Carlo equilibrated simulations for both fully connected and power-law diluted versions of the model. The critical temperatures extracted from the finite-size scaling (FSS) analysis of spin-glass susceptibility are in good agreement with theoretical predictions for $σ= 0, 0.25$, and 0.55. For these values of the long-range exponent $σ$ (which is the power of the decrease of the interactions between the spins with their separation), one might have expected that mean-field theory would provide a good description of the system. However, the spin-overlap distribution and the value of the $λ$-parameter do not provide numerical evidence for a one-step replica symmetry breaking (1RSB) phase transition. Instead, our results indicate a direct transition from the paramagnetic state to a full replica symmetry broken phase, with a renormalized value of $λ\equiv ω_2/ω_1 < 1$ suggesting a continuous FRSB transition, despite this ratio being equal to 2 at mean-field level. A value of $λ> 1$ is required for the discontinuous 1RSB transition. We argue that strong finite-size effects and closely spaced transition temperatures remove the expected 1RSB transition for the system sizes which we can study. For values of the exponent $σ= 0.85$, which roughly corresponds to a three dimensional system, we find that the renormalized value of $λ$ is again less than 1, with no signs of either the 1RSB transition or the continuous FRSB transition, suggesting that the Kauzmann temperature $T_K$ in three dimensions might be zero and the complete absence of phase transitions in structural glasses.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究平衡的$M=4$、$p=4$自旋玻璃模型，将其作为有限维短程$p$-自旋玻璃模型的一维长程代理模型，以探究超越平均场理论的玻璃转变本质。我们对模型的完全连接版本和幂律稀释版本进行了大规模蒙特卡洛平衡模拟。从自旋玻璃磁化率的有限尺寸标度分析中提取的临界温度，与$σ=0$、$0.25$和$0.55$情况下的理论预测吻合良好。对于这些长程指数$σ$（它表征自旋间相互作用随距离衰减的幂次）值，人们可能预期平均场理论能很好地描述该系统。然而，自旋重叠分布和$λ$参数值并未为一步复本对称破缺相变提供数值证据。相反，我们的结果表明系统直接从顺磁态转变为完全复本对称破缺相，重整化的$λ\equiv ω_2/ω_1 < 1$值暗示了一个连续的FRSB转变，尽管该比值在平均场水平上等于2。不连续的1RSB转变需要$λ > 1$。我们认为，强烈的有限尺寸效应和紧密相邻的转变温度，在我们所能研究的系统尺寸范围内，消除了预期的1RSB转变。对于指数$σ=0.85$（大致对应于三维系统）的情况，我们发现重整化的$λ$值再次小于1，且没有出现1RSB转变或连续FRSB转变的迹象，这表明三维情况下的考兹曼温度$T_K$可能为零，并且结构玻璃中完全不存在相变。</p></details> | 2026-04-16 | Prerak Gupta et al. |
| 7 | **[Spinon mediation of witness spin dynamics in herbertsmithite](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.11678v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The kagome lattice of spin-1/2 copper atoms in herbertsmithite is conjectured to sustain a quantum spin liquid state with spinon quasiparticles. Ideally, the kagome crystal planes are each separated by a plane of spinless zinc atoms. However, in real crystals some spin-1/2 copper atoms substitute randomly onto these inter-kagome zinc sites. Here we reconceptualize such 'impurity' atoms as quantum witness spins whose dynamics is designed to probe the spin liquid state. We then introduce spin noise spectroscopy to measure the frequency and temperature dependence of witness spin dynamics, demonstrating that their phenomenology is consistent with extensive interactions between witness spins mediated by propagation of spinons through a quantum spin liquid. Ultimately, a sharp transition occurs at around 260 mK, below which the properties of both spin noise and magnetic susceptibility suggest that the witness spins form a spin glass phase. Among theoretical models considered, we demonstrate that our observations are only consistent with spinon-mediated interactions between witness spins by either a Z2 or U(1) quantum spin liquid, with the former model more closely matching the data. Our work demonstrates that quantum mechanical witness spins may now conceivably be used as a widely applicable probe of quantum spin liquid physics.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>赫伯特史密斯石中自旋-1/2铜原子构成的笼目晶格被推测可维持具有自旋子准粒子的量子自旋液体态。理想情况下，笼目晶格平面之间由一层无自旋的锌原子平面分隔。然而，在实际晶体中，部分自旋-1/2铜原子会随机取代这些笼目层间的锌位点。本研究将这些"杂质"原子重新概念化为量子见证自旋，其动力学被设计用于探测自旋液体态。我们随后引入自旋噪声谱技术来测量见证自旋动力学的频率与温度依赖性，证明其现象学符合通过量子自旋液体中自旋子传播介导的见证自旋间广泛相互作用。最终在约260毫K处发生急剧转变，低于该温度时，自旋噪声与磁化率的特性均表明见证自旋形成了自旋玻璃相。在考察的理论模型中，我们证明观测结果仅与Z2或U(1)量子自旋液体介导的见证自旋间自旋子相互作用相符，其中前者模型与数据吻合更佳。我们的工作表明，量子力学见证自旋如今可被视为一种广泛适用的量子自旋液体物理探测工具。</p></details> | 2026-04-16 | Hiroto Takahashi et al. |
